narrative:
Precinct York Township (precinct in Darke County) has 339 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
